creator: tdb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just to further follow this up. I too had trouble with the 96xx driver
using the latest Xorg. Updating to the 96.43.11 release fixed it for me,
so it'd be great to see the port updated to that version.

Tim.

-- 
Tim Bishop
http://www.bishnet.net/tim/
